design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash(title+kind+audience+generated_at) → architecture=workflow-command-center, typography=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[gapless-bento-grid, workflow-playbook-timeline, implementation-checklist], gsap=[card-stacking, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: Hero=Attention, Proof/Bento=Interest, Workflow+Media=Desire, CTA Band=Action. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk (headings/body). Hero Math Verification: max-width 1120px, clamp sizing ensures 2–3 lines. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded animations with fallbacks. Label Sweep & Button Check: black primary CTA, white secondary CTA verified.
headline: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

site_brief.audience: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies AI assistant
local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

summary: A conversion‑focused, editorial‑grade niche landing page showing how local service businesses can use Super as a personal AI agent to handle bookings, quotes, and customer replies by operating real software and reusing a computer-use cache for repeated workflows.
